reforms.description: A fast track licensing system has been implemented in Mexico City to expedite the opening of new businesses, allowing them to commence operations within seven to 21 days.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The expedited licensing process reduces barriers to entry for new businesses, fostering entrepreneurship and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The fast track licensing system is currently operational in Mexico City.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform significantly improves the business environment but does not represent a structural change.
reforms.source_quote: A ‘fast track’ licensing system has been implemented in Mexico City to allow the vast majority of new businesses to open within seven to 21 days.

reforms.description: The PRONAFIDE document emphasizes the importance of investing in education, training, and infrastructure to enhance labor efficiency and technological progress, which are crucial for sustainable economic growth.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Investments in education and training are essential for building a skilled workforce that can drive innovation and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The PRONAFIDE initiative has been actively promoting education and training programs since its implementation.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a significant commitment to enhancing human capital, which is foundational for long-term economic development.
reforms.source_quote: The programme offers a rather comprehensive policy framework... stresses the importance of investing in education, training, adequate nutrition and health care, as well as developing infrastructure.

reforms.description: The Mexican government outlined a comprehensive reform strategy for the health sector aimed at providing high-quality and cost-effective health care for the entire population, focusing on access, efficiency, and sustainability.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving health care access and efficiency contributes to a healthier workforce, which is vital for economic productivity.
reforms.status_evidence: The comprehensive health strategy has been in effect and is actively improving health care services.
reforms.importance_rationale: This reform represents a major overhaul of the health sector, aiming for systemic improvements in health care delivery.
reforms.source_quote: The present administration has outlined a reform strategy in its Development Plan... The specific reform programme for the health sector provides more details.
